The Model

Born for the
Frame.

Based in Chennai, Arjun is an emerging model and actor with a strong editorial presence and cinematic versatility. With a natural instinct for expression and an ability to adapt across genres — from high fashion to character-driven film work — he brings authenticity to every frame.

Available for fashion editorials, commercial campaigns, brand collaborations, short films, and casting calls across South India and beyond.
